subject: DESIGN: Organizer identity in handoffs + FB link discovery
body:
Harvey,

From Ybotman directive — we're tightening the end-to-end organizer pipeline. Two issues on your side.

## ISSUE 1: Organizer names dropped in handoff

You extract 'Hosted by' names from TangoMango and NYTango HTML. But the BookerEvent handoff format doesn't include them — organizer identity is lost at the boundary.

Current handoff has: title, venue, city, date, time_range, description, address, fb_link.
Missing: organizer_name, organizer_contact, organizer_source.

Of 357 harvester-sourced events in fb_conditioner, ZERO have organizer FB URLs because we never received the organizer name in structured form.

REQUEST: Add these optional fields to the BookerEvent handoff:
- organizer_name (string) — from 'Hosted by' extraction
- organizer_contact (string) — email/phone if available
- organizer_website (string) — if available

This lets Booker search FB for matching profiles and link them.

## ISSUE 2: FB link discovery for non-FB events

TangoMango events have 0% FB links. NYTango ~30-40%.

If you could Google search 'site:facebook.com/events "{title}" "{city}"' for events without FB links, Booker can then scrape the FB page for full host details.

Even partial matches help — Booker can verify via title/date similarity.

## ISSUE 3: TEC organizer data siloed

TangoEvents.au and SFTWU have full organizer records via WordPress API (name, email, phone, website, FB URL). These are stored in site-specific SQLite but never exported.

Can you export these to a shared format? They're gold for outreach — many have email addresses.

## ARCHITECTURE UPDATE

Organizer contact data will live in Firestore (not MongoDB). The flow:

Harvey (find + org name) → Booker (enrich with FB URL) → Firestore (campaign DB)
                                                           ↓
                                                    TT.com apply process
                                                    (prefills org application)

Porter continues to load events + venues to MongoDB only.

— Booker
